_description: Modern documentary target: 50% AI B-roll (Veo 3.1 or Hailuo i2v from Wikimedia stills), motion graphics via Remotion (kinetic type + lower thirds + stat callouts), Manim for maps/timelines, sound design (Freesound + ElevenLabs SFX + Purple Planet beds), light-leak transitions, film grain LUT.
notes: First variant to actually contest Fern/LEMMiNO polish. Requires api_keys.json + Freesound token + optional fal.ai key.
